Original Text: Alexandre United States Superior Twin Room 1 night · March 2026 Solo traveller Reviewed: 17 April 2026 Very nice and clean hotel facility. Disappointing breakfast with multiple options. Scored 7.0 7.0 Room and facilities were very clean and well-maintained. Security was very good with working dog patrols and security gate access. Bathroom/shower was clean with good quality towels. Breakfast was a great disappointment albeit with a good variety of options. Coffee machine was broken and a coffee pot was brought out to provide no options for coffee. The eggs-to-order grill was unattended. After 10 minutes I asked the restaurant attendant for assistance and it took another five minutes for the cook to arrive, by which time so many others had lined up to order I had to wait longer (having previously been first in line), and was provided an overcooked plane egg omelet despite ordering a vegetarian omelet with all the vegetables available (and the cook even asked to confirm “omelet with everything but no meat”). What was provided as orange juice was not orange juice but a sweetened orange-flavored drink made from a powder mix. Disappointing. When I mentioned this upon checkout, I was assured the breakfast — which I did not eat — would not be charged and I would be provided a free breakfast upon my return visit days later… which I was not provided. Some of the staff was very courteous while others were unhelpful and seemed annoyed with having to interact with guests. The hotel is located on an extremely busy multi-lane road and intersection by the airport property but 1.6 km from terminals 2 and 3 that precludes walking safely. There was nothing in the neighborhood worth walking to or to see. Hotel response: Dear Valued Guest,  Thank you for sharing your feedback... Continue reading Helpful Not helpful
AI Summary: While the hotel offered clean facilities and good security, the guest experienced significant disappointment due to poor breakfast service, unhelpful staff interactions, an unfulfilled promise for a free breakfast, and an inconvenient location.
